creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
I've tried to install FreeBSD port x11/lxpanel, and disabled ALSA on
the options But the port still have a RUN_DEPENDS that look for
alsa-lib.
I've check the Makefile and found that there is an "WITH_ALSA=yes" in
the Makefile (ignoring OPTION choice: It always be enabled).
There is a forced "WITH_ALSA=yes" in the Makefile that should be removed.
